ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Continued To Nov-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 304

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc., And K-M Industries Holding Co., Inc.
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Asbestos Default Prove-Up Hearing / Plaintiff's Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc., And K-M Industries Holding Co., Inc.

Dept. 304, Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: J. Alameda. Reported: For The Record.

Kimberly Chu, Esq., of Brayton Purcell, appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff BRUCE YOUNGBLUTH, AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO AND AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR OF MYRON YOUNGBLUTH, DECEASED; AND BRADLEY YOUNGBLUTH AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR OF MYRON YOUNGBLUTH, DECEASED.

Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement at Default Prove-up hearing on file.

No appearance by defaulted defendants KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC. and K-M INDURSTRIES HOLDING CO., INC.

Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

The Court admits all exhibits to the Declaration of James P. Nevin in Support of Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc., And K-M Industries Holding Co., Inc., filed on January 24, 2025.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from defendants KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC. and K-M INDURSTRIES HOLDING CO., INC. in the amount of:

As to KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.,
$2,000,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages,
Total Judgment of $2,000,000.00

As to K-M INDURSTRIES HOLDING CO., INC.,
$2,000,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages,
Total Judgment of $2,000,000.00

The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

(The total judgment of $2,000,000.00 is as to each defaulted defendant.)
